title: Cobblespawn
description: An extension of the original Cobblemon spawn pool.
body:
This data pack aims to make every single non-legendary Pokémon in Cobblemon spawn naturally in the world! While not yet fully implemented, this beta release already expands the spawn pool significantly, adding many new species to various biomes, including rare Paradox Pokémon.

# Current Features (Beta Version):

✅ Full Pokédex Implementation – Every non-legendary Pokémon in Cobblemon have a natural spawn.

✅ Paradox Pokémon Introduced – Some Paradox Pokémon now have appropriate spawn locations.

✅ Biome-Specific Spawning – Pokémon distributions are adjusted to match their natural habitats.

✅ Balanced Spawn Rates – Tweaked to prevent overpopulation of certain species.

# Planned Features:

🚀 More Refined Balance Tweaks – Further spawn rate adjustments based on feedback.

This beta version is a work in progress, so expect updates as more Pokémon are added to the spawn pool. Your feedback is welcome as we work toward a fully complete spawn expansion!
